slides.title: What is Playwright?
bulletPoints: A modern End-to-End (E2E) testing framework developed by Microsoft.
Supports all modern rendering engines including Chromium, WebKit, and Firefox.
Tests can run across Windows, Linux, and macOS, locally or on CI, headless or headed.
slides.note: Playwright avoids flakiness by auto-waiting for elements before performing actions.

slides.title: Your First Playwright Test
bulletPoints: Tests are written in TypeScript or JavaScript using the Playwright Test runner.
Every test receives isolated 'page' and 'browser' contexts automatically.
Use the 'test' and 'expect' utilities to structure the spec.
slides.note: Notice the use of 'async/await' - Playwright is entirely Promise-based for clean, linear control flow.
